---
output:
  pdf_document:
    fig_caption: true
    number_sections: true
    toc: false
lang: lt
bibliography: bibliografija.bib
csl: harvard-cite-them-right.csl
link-citations: true
fig_caption: true
extra_dependencies: ["float", "multicol"]
header-includes:
- \renewcommand{\contentsname}{Turinys}
- \usepackage{float}
- \usepackage{booktabs}
- \usepackage{multicol}
- \usepackage{amsthm}
- \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
- \usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
- \newtheorem*{proposition}{Teiginys}
- \newtheorem*{definition}{Apibrėžimas}
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: sentence
nocite: '@tiesiniai_modeliai @regresine_analize'
---
